name: Abeyance
note: hold a magical effect in reserve, released on a trigger or condition

name: Air
note: command and conjure air, wind, and gases

name: Apportation
note: move objects at a distance; magical transport

name: Cancellation
note: negate, dispel, or suppress magic

name: Communication
note: mind-to-mind contact and magical messaging

name: Compulsion
note: command and bend the will of others

name: Dimension
note: size, reach, range, and the scaling of effects (merged Expansion & Extension)

name: Divination
note: knowledge of the hidden, distant, or yet to come

name: Earth
note: command earth, stone, and metal

name: Emotion
note: sense and sway feelings

name: Essence
note: imbue qualities/effects into a target (give) and draw power or qualities out (take); merged Instil & Tap. Taking effects are one complexity level harder than the matching giving effect — giving is easier than taking

name: Fire
note: command and conjure fire and heat

name: Form
note: shape and reshape matter

name: Image
note: visual illusion

name: Sandestin
note: summon and bind magical servitor entities to carry complex effects

name: Scent
note: created and illusory smells and tastes

name: Sense
note: grant, sharpen, or manipulate the senses

name: Sound
note: created and illusory sound

name: Summon
note: call creatures, spirits, or objects to you

name: Time
note: hasten, delay, or perceive the flow of time

name: Touch
note: created and illusory touch and tactile sensation

name: Water
note: command water, liquids, and ice

name: Wood
note: command plants, wood, and living growth
